name: Image Converter — Custom Name + More Formats

features.label: Custom Output Filename
features.desc: Set a custom name for converted images. Extension auto-appended based on selected format. Live preview shows final filename. Sanitizes special characters automatically.

features.label: More Output Formats
features.desc: Added TIFF, AVIF, SVG, ICO output formats. ICO auto-clamps to standard icon sizes (16–32–48–64…256px). SVG wraps raster images.
